label: Ukraine War — airspace closure
description: Russian invasion of Ukraine triggers closure of Ukrainian and Russian airspace to Western airlines

label: Ryanair FR4978 forced landing — Belarus
description: Belarus forces Ryanair flight FR4978 to land in Minsk, triggering EU airspace bans over Belarus

label: Gaza conflict — Middle East airspace disruption
description: Gaza conflict triggers airspace closures and rerouting across Middle East

label: Sudan civil war — airspace closure
description: Sudan civil war forces closure of Khartoum FIR and surrounding airspace
